name: incident-report
description: Markdown sibling of the incident / postmortem report: header with severity and status, TL;DR summary, an ordered timeline, root-cause prose, an impact list, and owned action items. The agent pre-renders the timeline/impact/followups collections into lists before substitution.

slots.description: Resolution status, e.g. Resolved | Mitigating | Investigating.
Pre-rendered extra meta (duration, detected time, owner) as an inline list.
Pre-rendered ordered list of timeline events; prefix each with its time and dot variant.
Root-cause prose; may include an inline fenced diff.
Pre-rendered list of key/value rows quantifying blast radius.
Pre-rendered checklist of owned action items with owner and due date.
Footer provenance / authorship line, auto-filled by the agent.

shape.timeline[]: { time: string, event: string, dot: enum[default,impact,mitigated] }
shape.followups[]: { owner: string, action: string, due: string, done: boolean }
